title: The Strangers' Banquet
writer: Brian Oswald Donn-Byrne, Marshall Neilan, Frank Urson
actors: Hobart Bosworth, Claire Windsor, Rockliffe Fellowes
plot: In managing the shipyard inherited from her father, Derith Keogh has considerable labor problems and accedes to the unreasonable demands of John Trevelyan, an anarchist labor agitator. Derith's brother John is off in pursuit of an...
